Step 1 of 2 — Connect your account

Your Fantasy Football Command Center

Connect your fantasy football account once and pull every league into one war room — rosters, rankings, trade tools and league analysis.

P
● Welcome back
Your account
Resume your last session · tap to jump back in

⚡
⇌
— or connect a different account —
🔗

Connect with your ESPN League ID. Find it in your league's web URL — …/league?leagueId=XXXXXX. Paste it below and we'll pull that league in.

Where do I find my League ID?
  • 1Open your league on fantasy.espn.com in a desktop browser.
  • 2The address bar URL contains leagueId=XXXXXX.
  • 3Copy that number and paste it above.
private league?

Private leagues can't be read from the browser — ESPN requires these cookies sent server-side. This needs the backend sync; entering them here won't pull a private league yet.

SWID *
espn_s2 *
Where do I find these?
  • 1Open fantasy.espn.com and make sure you're logged in.
  • 2Open developer tools → Application → Cookies.
  • 3Copy the values of SWID and espn_s2 and paste them above.

Read-only · No password stored

·

Sleeper Integration

Seamlessly connect your Sleeper leagues to the Vault for real-time draft analytics, automated pick exporting, and advanced roster management.

GLOBAL SYNC SETTINGS
Live Sync

🛡 VAULT SECURITY PROTOCOL

Your Sleeper API credentials are encrypted with AES-256 and never stored in plain text. Connection is established via secure OAuth 2.0 tunneling.
